rulings.Case Title: LAURENT REBOUL INDIVIDUALLY AND AS BENEFICIARY OF VS. VALLEY OF CALIFORNIA INC DBA COLDWELL BANKER TRI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint Of Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Laurent Reboul as a beneficiary of the Olga Eugenia Lindemood Testamentary Trust vs Valley of California, Inc. dba Coldwell Banker TRI et. al. Demurrer to second amended complaint by Defendants Valley of California, Inc. dba Coldwell Banker TRI, Michael Schroeder, Christopher Garlington and Joel Ware tentative ruling: overruled as to causes of action 1 through 12 with 10 days leave to amend.
